title: The Platform
tmdbOverview: A slab of food descends down a vertical facility. The residents above eat heartily, leaving those below starving and desperate. A rebellion is imminent.
synopsis: Released in 2019, The Platform is a drama, science fiction and thriller film from Spain. It holds a solid 7.0 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
